pairs.req_text: PhD students must bring their own resources to their PhD program.
pairs.origin_turn_text: I am not a successful one but I have studied the placement and trajectory of many PhD students before I start. My major takeaway is that: you should never expect enough resource from the department. You should bring your resource to your PhD, not work under the assumption of limited resource, like the hunter of the tribe

origin_turn_actions.action_text: Admits they are not a successful one.
States they studied the placement and trajectory of many PhD students before starting.
Advises not to expect sufficient resources from the department.
Advises bringing one's own resources to a PhD rather than assuming limited resources.
